field.label: Tunnel IP
field.help: The VPN client's tunnel IP address (e.g. 10.10.10.2). This is the WireGuard peer's static IP.

field.label: Outbound Gateway
field.help:
Gateway name to route this device's traffic through (e.g. "BA_VPNV4" for an OpenVPN gateway).
Leave empty to use default WAN routing.
Use the exact gateway name as shown in System > Gateways.

field.label: Target Alias (optional)
field.help:
Only route traffic matching this firewall alias through the gateway (e.g. "BA_HOSTS").
Leave empty to route ALL traffic from this device through the gateway.
The alias must exist in Firewall > Aliases.
